id.title: Unlock ID, try to make it unique

parentUnlockId.title: Setting this to another item's unlock ID, will require unlocking the other item first before making this mod available
parentUnlockId.description:
You can reference an other workshop item's id for this. However it must then also include the prefix "modNode:".
As an example, to set the Badger-ex as the parent unlock, you must add: "parentUnlockId": "modNode:Badger-ex"

shortDescription.title: Short blurb used in compact UI

linearDamping.title: Movement drag, higher = sluggish and harder to push around

angularDamping.title: Turn drag, higher = rotation less impact from physics forces, such as recoil.

previewOutline.title: PNG file name for preview image.

preview32.title: PNG file name for small preview (32x32 pixels).

mechController.title: Movement controller for mechs
mechController.description: Only 1 vehicle controller should be added. This will also define the vehicle type

weaponSlots.title: List of weapon slots.
weaponSlots.description: A weaponMount with matching slotId must also be added to allow the weapon to spawn.

limbs.title: Feet/legs settings for mechs
limbs.description: Should only be added when also making use of the mechController

node.title: Vehicle object root. In the case of mechs, this would usually be the lower body.
node.description: Other vehicles generally don't have a split between upper/lower body, so this would just be the main body of the vehicle.
